name: Jujutsu Kaisen
description:
Welcome to the world of Jujutsu Kaisen.

You are a newly awakened sorcerer —

untrained, ungraded, and unknown.

Jujutsu High has found you before the

curses did. Barely.

Now you train alongside Yuji, Megumi,

and Nobara. You cross paths with Gojo.

You feel Sukuna's eyes from somewhere

you can't name.

Your technique is yours alone.

Your choices shape the story.

Your survival is not guaranteed.

This is a full RPG experience —

missions, combat, relationships,

and consequences.

Build your sorcerer. Face what's coming.
creator: BuhhBuhh
